name: BLACK CAT
description: One of the world's premiere thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!
lore: Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side! After being ousted from the Thieves Guild, the Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum. Her job: Steal the Tablet of Life and Time so the Kingpin can harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax's dangerous timestream incursion.

abilities.name: FELINE FURY
abilities.description: Swipe forward with razor-sharp claws

abilities.name: CALLING CARD
abilities.description: Issue a Calling Card to all enemies. Instantly dash to any enemy in sight and range, tearing into them with your claws to deal Percentage Damage

abilities.name: CAT'S CRADLE
abilities.description: Lunge forward with claws bared, slicing through any enemies caught in your path

stats.Cooldown: 1 charges, with each charge taking 8s to recharge

abilities.name: TURN OF FORTUNE
abilities.description: Launch a grappling hook forward that damages an enemy on impact and steals Fortunebefore pulling it back to Black Cat

abilities.name: THIEVING GRACE
abilities.description: Perform a double jump

abilities.name: FORTUNE'S FAVOR
abilities.description: Spend Fortuneto unleash either Grapple Swipeor Phantom Pursuit

abilities.name: STEALTHY CATWALK
abilities.description: Hold {Jump} to crawl up vertical surfaces

abilities.name: MALKIN MISFORTUNE
abilities.description: Apply Jinxto enemies on hit. Jinxedfoes have a chance to lose their bonus damage when striking Black Cat with a Critical Hit

abilities.name: CLAW WHIP
abilities.description: Fire out tethered claws and whip them forward in a devastating arc, dealing damage to all enemies caught in range

stats.Spell Field Range: 150° cone spell field with a radius of 7.5m and a height of 2.5m
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 30°, drop to 30% of maximum damage at 75°

abilities.description: Swiftly dash to an enemy, unleash a rapid flurry of claw attacks, and flash back to your starting position. Black Cat is Untargetableduring this move

abilities.name: GILDED DEAL
abilities.description: Use the Spatial Resonator to open a portal to the Elder Gods' dimension, consuming Fortune to trade with the Golden Elder and acquire items from the New York Thieves Guild vault.

abilities.name: TABLET OF DESTINIES
abilities.description: Gain a random amount of Fortune

abilities.name: HELM OF HADES
abilities.description: Enter Invisiblestate for a set duration

abilities.name: FALTINE FLAME ORB
abilities.description: Conjure an orb of mystical Faltine Flame to Revealand mark all nearby enemies

abilities.name: CHERNOBOG'S CRYSTAL
abilities.description: Purify yourself, instantly removing any active control effects

abilities.name: RING OF ZONA
abilities.description: Open a portal on a surface, allowing instant traversal to the opposite side

abilities.name: MENTO-FISH
abilities.description: Create a hypnosis field. Inflicts Slow, disables movement abilities, and Groundsall enemies caught within

stats.Casting: Projectile that generates a spell field upon impact
stats.Spell Field Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 5m and a height of 40m.

abilities.name: STICKY PAWS
abilities.description: Steal a set amount of Fortunewhenever your attacks hit an enemy

stats.Fortune Lost Upon Death: Lose 50% of Fortune when defeated, with a minimum deduction of 200

received.name: GIFT OF GOLD
received.description: Black Cat shares items acquired from Insider Trading with White Fox and Captain America. White Fox receives the Life Orb, which restores Spirit Fox Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Radiance that auto-tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting allies speed and healing while dealing damage and slowing enemies. Captain America receives the Vibranium Energy Amplifier, which expands shield block range when raised and reflects projectiles back along the crosshair direction.

received.name: GIFT OF GOLD
received.description: Black Cat shares items acquired from Insider Trading with White Fox and Captain America. White Fox receives the Life Orb, which restores Spirit Fox Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Radiance that auto-tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting allies speed and healing while dealing damage and slowing enemies. Captain America receives the Vibranium Energy Amplifier, which expands shield block range when raised and reflects projectiles back along the crosshair direction.

base.description: Taking damage accumulates Vibranium Energy. Upon reaching a specific threshold, Black Cat can unleash a violent explosion, damaging and Knocking back surrounding enemies while gaining a brief Speed Boost and Bonus Health.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Black Panther, this explosion is no longer restricted by the energy threshold and can be triggered at any time.

stats.Special Effect: No longer limited by energy accumulation ratio; can be cast anytime

base.description: Turn of Fortune is replaced by Spider-Web Grapple, which has 2 charges. Landing the grapple on an enemy steals Fortune and applies a Spider-Tracer. If Black Cat hits an enemy carrying a Spider-Tracer with any other ability, she triggers the mark to deal bonus damage.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Spider-Man, using Spider-Web Grapple to hit an enemy already marked with a Spider-Tracer temporarily Immobilizes them in place.
